title: Asmel n IATF
summary: Asebtar-agi d win n International Accessibility Task Force.
problem: IATF tella teḥwaǧ axxam aɣelnaw yeṣfan ara d-yessegziyen amedya, ad d-yefk umuɣ n yisenfaren, d wid ara yefken afus n lemεawna i uḍar i d-iteddun.
why: Asmel-a d tawwurt n uqerru n IATF. Yettwabna-d d aɣawas amecṭuḥ akken ad yili yeshel ad iɣer, ad yessuqel, yerna ad iṭṭef deg lqanun.
scopeIn: Isebtar n usiweḍ n medden i d-yesfehmen amedya n IATF
Aḍebsi aɣelnaw n yisenfaren IATF yettwaqeblen, i yellan deg ccɣel, d wid yettwaḥerzen s talɣa-nsen, wid i ten-yettḥadaren, asenduq d usekles.
Taɣect n teglizit s unagraw yeldin i tsuqilt
Asenfaṛ amatu ɣef Cloudflare Workers Static Assets
scopeOut: Timnaḍin n yilmeẓyen tiberkanin, isekkilen, neɣ izerfan n useqdec
Aḥezzeb n usekkil n usenfaṛ, yettidiren deg usebded n yal asenfaṛ s timmad-is
Ameslay deg teswiεt n tidet, i d-yezgan deg Discord
Aḍfar n yisenfaren i yal usenfar, i d-yezgan deg usebded n GitHub n yal asenfar

title: IATF selfie
summary: D anagraw amezwaru n IATF, yettwasekles mi yewweḍ ɣer yiwet n temnaḍt n uḥebbes.
problem: Tazrawt tamezwarut n yiwen n wesnulfu i d-yettunefken ɣef uḥezzeb sɣur IATF.
why: Aḍebsi-a yettwaḥrez d aɣelnaw, ɣas akken leqdic n usnulfu yeḥbes.
scopeIn: Asnulfu amezwaru n yiwen n uselkin i d-yettunefken ɣef tuqqna yettwaḥerzen d aḍebsi aɣelnaw

title: IATF bot
summary: Bot n tmetti n IATF, yettwasekles mi yewweḍ ɣer yiwet n temnaḍt n uḥebbes.
problem: Tasenselkimt deg izerfan n tmetti n IATF.
why: Aḍebsi-a yettwaḥrez d aɣelnaw, ɣas akken leqdic n usnulfu yeḥbes.
scopeIn: Aselkim n umennuɣ ɣef izerfan n tmetti n IATF, yettwaḥerzen d aḍebsi aɣelnaw
